InstructionData.Title: HVAC AC Controller 1
InstructionData.Description: - slots into the AC unit - use a dial to control target temp​
InstructionData.Author: Scriptslol
InstructionData.Instructions:
alias thermostat d0
define K 273.15
loop:
l r0 thermostat Setting add r0 r0 K s db Setting r0
sleep 10
j loop
